Package com.tonic.jaloc.impl.ringbuffers

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    PBoolRingBuffer
    A fixed-capacity native bool ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest element.
    PByteRingBuffer
    A fixed-capacity native byte ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest element.
    PCharRingBuffer
    A fixed-capacity native char ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest element.
    PDoubleRingBuffer
    A fixed-capacity native double ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest element.
    PFloatRingBuffer
    A fixed-capacity native float ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest element.
    PIntRingBuffer
    A fixed-capacity native int ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest element.
    PLongRingBuffer
    A fixed-capacity native long ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest element.
    PShortRingBuffer
    A fixed-capacity native short ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest element.
    PStructRingBuffer<T extends PStruct>
    A fixed-capacity native struct ring buffer; enqueueing when full overwrites the oldest entry.
